problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
